meaning: n.微气象学(研究大气最下层小规模气象情况的气象学分支)
examples: The observations included the micrometeorology, radiation, eddy covariance observation systems and soil water content profiles.
In this paper, the data of the micrometeorology near the surface, the net radiation and the local pressure at Mizuho Station in Antarctica(1979) are analysed.
Environment conditions affect the capability of light utility of crop leaf, whereas, the effect of crop colony on micrometeorology will influence photosynthesis of leaf.
